hook.summary: Character training interface showing stat gains followed by a race start.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen showing a character portrait on the left and gameplay footage of training and racing on the right.

scene_flow: Introduction of character Agnes Tachyon with training gameplay showing stat increases and a success message.
Transition to a race sequence featuring the characters running on a turf track with the text 'Watch them race!'.
Close-up of the character in a lab coat transitioning to a high-energy idol concert performance.
Full group shot of the cast on stage with confetti and celebratory atmosphere.
Final end card with game title, download buttons, and 'Play Now' call to action.
audience_proxy: Young adult anime enthusiasts who enjoy character collection and management simulators.
